summary.notes: Input-05 was deliberately vague/adversarial; the skill correctly declined and explained why, which is the professional response. Input-04 (long 15-tweet thread) had several tweets that likely exceed the 280-character limit — this is a known challenge with longer threads and the skill appropriately advises verifying in the composer. All substantive inputs with clear briefs produced well-structured threads with strong standalone openers and response-inviting closes. The no-verbal-filler assertion passed 5/5 across all inputs.
